verses.text: Tua ciangin Judah mi khempeuh in kum sawmleguk a pha Uzziah la-in a pa Amaziah' tangin kumpi-in a koih uh hi
Kumpi ahi ama pa a sih khit ciangin amah in Eloth khua la kikin Judah gam dingin a ngahkik hi
Uzziah in uk ding a kipatin kum sawmleguk pha a, amah in Jerusalem-ah kum sawmngalenih sung uk hi. Ama nu' min Jekoliah hi a, Jerusalem khuami ahi hi
A pa Amaziah' hihsa khempeuh bangin amah in Topa' mitah a man sem hi
Pasian zahtak ding ama tungah a hilh Zekhariah' hun sungteng amah in Pasian zong hi. Amah in Topa a zon' laiteng, Pasian in amah daupaisak hi

Amah kuankhia-in Filistia mite va sim a, Gath khuapi kulh, Jabneh khuapi kulh, leh Ashdod khuapi kulh sucim hi. Tua ciangin amah in Ashdod gamsung leh Filistia-te' gamsung mun dangte-ah khuapite a lam hi
Filistia mite, Gurbaal-ah a teng Arab mite, leh Meunim mite a dona-ah Pasian in amah huh hi
Ammon mite in Uzziah tungah siah puak uh a, amah a thahat mahmah suak ahih manin a minthan'na in Egypt gam ciangdong nangawn zel hi
Tua thamloin Uzziah in Jerusalem a Kiu Kongpi leh a Kuam Kongpi, leh Kulh Keen sanah tausangte lam a, tuate kulh tawh a um hi

Tua ciangin amah in gamlakah tausangte lam a, Shefelah leh zanglei-ah ganhon tampi nei ahih manin tuikhuk tampi to a, lei nasep uuk ahih manin mualtung leh lei hoihna gamte-ah lokhote leh leenggui puahte a nei hi

Tua thamloin Uzziah in kumpipa' khutnuai-ah galkap ukte khat ahi Hananiah' ukna nuai-ah, lai-at Jeiel leh ulian Maaseiah in mi a khop lai-in a khen khenin a koih a mi phazah mah bangin, galsim dingin a hoih galkap tampi a nei hi
A thahat galkapmang a vekpi-in tul nih leh za guk ahi hi
Amaute' ukna nuai-ah galdona-ah kumpipa a huh dingin thahatna tawh gal a do thei ding galkap tul za nga om hi
Uzziah in galkap khempeuh-a' dingin lumte, teipite, sik lukhute, thalte, lot ding suangtangte a bawl hi

Amah in thaltangte leh suang liante lotna dingin tausang omna munte leh a kiute-ah koih ding, mi a siamte in a bawltawm sette, Jerusalem-ah a bawl hi. Amah a thahat dong a lamdangpi khatin kihuh ahih manin ama minthan'na in gamlapi a zel hi

Ahih hangin amah a thahat ciangin a siatna dingin a kiphatsakna hong khang hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa a Pasian tungah amah khial a, paknamtui biakna tau tungah paknamtui hal dingin Topa' biakinn sungah a lut hi
Ahih hangin Topa' siampi Azariah, a thahat mihing sawmgiat tawh ama nungah pai hi

Tua ciangin amaute in Kumpi Uzziah nialin ama kiangah, “Uzziah aw, Topa' tungah paknamtui hal ding nangma hih ding hilo hi. Paknamtui hal dingin a ki-ap, Aaron' suan siampite' hih ding ahi hi. Biakinn sung panin paikhia in; bang hang hiam cih leh na gamta khial a, hih bang hihna in Topa Pasian tung panin nang' tungah pahtawina hong tun'lo ding hi,” a ci uh hi

Tua ciangin Uzziah a heh suak hi. Tu-in amah in paknamtui a hal dingin a khutsungah paknamtui beel tawi a, siampite tungah a hehna hangin paknamtui biakna tau gei Topa' biakinn sung siampite' muhin ama taltangah phaknatna hong suakkhia hi

Tua ciangin siampi lian Azariah leh siampi khempeuh in amah a et uh ciangin a taltangah phaknatna na nei hi. Tua ciangin amaute in manlang takin amah sawnkhia uh a, Topa in amah vat khin ahih manin amahmah zong a paikhia dingin nawhtat hi

Tua ahih ciangin a sih ni dong Kumpi Uzziah a phak hi a, amah miphak ahih manin inn tuam khatah a teng hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa' biakinn panin amah kipuaseh hi. Tua ciangin a tapa Jotham in tua gam mite a uk hi
Tu-in Uzziah' gamtatna a omlaite, a patna panin a tawp dong, Amoz' tapa kamsang Isaiah in gelh hi
Uzziah si a, amaute in kumpite' neihsa hanah vui loin a huang sungah a vui uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in, “Amah a phak ahi hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin a tapa Jotham in ama tangin a uk hi.
